Interface Craftable

All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseArmor, BaseWeapon, HardstoneArmor, HardstoneSword, IronArmor, IronSword, MithrilArmor, MithrilSword, PlatinumArmor, PlatinumSword, StoneArmor, StoneSword, VibraniumArmor, VibraniumSword, WoodenSword
public interface Craftable
Represents an item that can be crafted using materials and gold.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canCraft(Player p)
    Checks whether the player has enough materials and gold to craft this item.
    void
    craft(Player p)
    Crafts this item, consuming the required materials and gold from the player's inventory.
    int
    getCraftingPrice()
    Returns the gold cost required to craft this item.
    ArrayList<ItemCounter>
    getRecipe()
    Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.

  • Method Details

    • getCraftingPrice

      int getCraftingPrice()
      Returns the gold cost required to craft this item.
      Returns:
      the crafting price in gold

    • getRecipe

      ArrayList<ItemCounter> getRecipe()
      Returns the list of materials and quantities required to craft this item.
      Returns:
      the recipe as a list of ItemCounter

    • canCraft

      boolean canCraft(Player p)
      Checks whether the player has enough materials and gold to craft this item.
      Parameters:
      p - the player attempting to craft
      Returns:
      true if the player can craft this item, false otherwise

    • craft

      void craft(Player p)
      Crafts this item, consuming the required materials and gold from the player's inventory. Does nothing if canCraft(Player) returns false.
      Parameters:
      p - the player who is crafting
